items.title: Google will pay SpaceX $920M per month for compute
items.summary: In a statement, a Google representative described the deal as a result of unexpected demand for its recently launched AI products.

items.title: AirTrunk commits $30B to build 5GW of AI data centers in India

items.title: The Meta hack shows there’s more to AI security than Mythos

items.title: Mira Murati steps back into the spotlight, carefully
items.summary: In the current environment, remaining heads down has diminishing returns; at some point, you have to make some noise just to remind the market you exist.
